contributor: university of illinois at urbana-champaign library, urbana, il
description: Matthew Wolls hypocritical talk about forced labor in the Soviet Union is an effort to draw the workers into the imperialists war plans against the Workers Government Rally for the defense of the U S S R on August Ist Vol VII No 181 U S BOSSES ROSH MOVE FOR WAR ON SOVIET UNION PROTEST FIGHT FOR USSR DEFENSE ON AUGUST Ist Rally on August Ist Against the AntiSoviet War Plans AMERICAN imperialism is feverishly rushing its war plans against the fatherland of the working classthe Soviet Union Every day brings to light additional evidence of these preparations and of the speed with which they are being jammed through All the agencies of the bourgeoisie are being mobilized efforts are being made to arouse all sections of the population against the workers state This already calls for decisive and energetic counter measures The toiling masses of the United States must be mobilized against these imperialist war preparations and for the defense of the Soviet Union August Ist must be the beginning Hundreds of thousands of workers must be brought into the streets next Friday as the first answer of the workers to these attacks These demonstrations must be followed by
